>更新时间：2026.07.11

# 微信支付 - 品牌门店（普通服务商）文档索引

> 品牌线下门店信息管理工具，支持地图选点和文件批量上传两种方式录入门店。录入后可在名片展示地址、营业状态等信息，可用于商品券适用门店圈定、摇优惠按位置精准投放，有效提升用户到店转化率。

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016628074.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016705104.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016628135.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4023148568.md)

## API 列表
- [创建品牌门店](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783183.md)
- [查询品牌门店](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783153.md)
- [查询品牌门店列表](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016756674.md)
- [更新品牌门店](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783158.md)
- [删除品牌门店](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783113.md)
- [暂停门店营业](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016756671.md)
- [恢复门店营业](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016756672.md)
- [绑定收款商户号](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783177.md)
- [解绑收款商户号](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783188.md)

## 请求示例

- [创建品牌门店 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783183-java.md)

- [恢复门店营业 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016756672-go.md)

- [更新品牌门店 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783158-java.md)
- [更新品牌门店 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783158-go.md)
- [查询品牌门店 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783153-curl.md)
- [查询品牌门店 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783153-java.md)

- [查询品牌门店列表 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016756674-go.md)

- [绑定收款商户号 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783177-java.md)
- [绑定收款商户号 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783177-go.md)

- [解绑收款商户号 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4015783188-go.md)
